---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Contact

Feel free to reach out to me through any of the following:

- **Email:** robertdavmullins@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** [Robert Mullins](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-mullins-176006319/)
- **GitHub:** [robert-mullins](https://github.com/robert-mullins)

## References

Available upon request.
